question: Are Bellezza nail products HEMA-free?
answer: Yes! All of our soft gel systems are 100% HEMA-free and non-toxic. We made that call intentionally — HEMA is a common allergen in many gel formulas, and we wanted a system you can feel good about using at home.

question: I'm a total beginner — is Bellezza really something I can do at home?
answer: Absolutely. Our products and kits are designed to be beginner-friendly while still delivering salon-quality results. If you want extra guidance, we also offer workshops and DIY classes so you can learn hands-on — there's an option for every skill level.

question: What is Drip Therapy and what does it do for my nails?
answer: Drip Therapy is our line of vitamin-rich oils and treatments made to restore, hydrate, and protect your nails and cuticles. It's the perfect fix for dry cuticles, brittle nails, or post-gel recovery — basically a nourishing glow-up for your nail health, one drop at a time.

question: Do you offer free shipping?
answer: Yes — we offer free shipping on all orders over $125. Easy.

question: What payment methods does Bellezza Miami accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal. Your payment is processed through secure, encrypted technology — we never store your payment information, so you can shop with confidence.

question: What happens if my order gets cancelled?
answer: If we ever need to cancel your order after payment — whether due to stock availability, a pricing error, or anything else — you'll receive a full refund. No hassle, no questions.

question: How can I get in touch with Bellezza Miami customer support?
answer: You can reach us at support@bellezzamiami.com — we're available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time. We aim to respond within 1–2 business days, and if it's about an order, just include your order number in the subject line so we can help you faster.

question: How can I get in touch with Bellezza Miami?
answer: You can reach us a few ways — give us a call at 305-942-3109, shoot us an email at bellezzamiami2023@gmail.com, or fill out the contact form on our website. We're here Monday through Friday, 9am to 5pm and happy to help!

question: Do you have a physical location I can visit?
answer: Yes! You can find us at 11900 Biscayne Blvd, Suite 110, Miami, FL 33181. Swing by during our business hours, Monday through Friday, 9am to 5pm.

question: How long does it take for my order to ship after I place it?
answer: All orders are processed within 1–3 business days after payment is confirmed. Orders placed on weekends or holidays are picked up on the next business day, and you'll get a shipping confirmation email with tracking as soon as your order is on its way.

question: What shipping speeds do you offer?
answer: We offer three options: Standard (5–7 business days), Expedited (2–3 business days), and Overnight (1 business day — just make sure to place your order before 12pm EST). Rates are calculated at checkout based on your location, order weight, and chosen method.

question: Do you ship internationally, and will I owe customs fees?
answer: Yes! We ship to select international destinations, with delivery typically taking 7–21 business days. Just keep in mind that any customs duties, taxes, or fees charged by your destination country are your responsibility — we can't predict or cover those on our end.

question: My package says delivered but I never got it — what should I do?
answer: First, check with your neighbors and your local post office, as packages sometimes end up nearby. If you still can't track it down, reach out to us at support@bellezzamiami.com and we'll help you figure out next steps.

question: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
answer: Yes, but you'll need to act fast! Contact us immediately at support@bellezzamiami.com — address changes can only be made before the order ships, so the sooner you reach out, the better.

question: Can I return something if I change my mind?
answer: Yes — you have 30 days from your delivery date to send it back, as long as it's unused and in the original packaging. Email us at support@bellezzamiami.com with your order number and the reason, and we'll come back to you with return instructions within 1–2 business days. Easy.

question: Can I return nail tips or a kit if I've already opened it?
answer: If it's still sealed in its original packaging, yes — 30 days from delivery. Once it's been opened, kits, boxes of tips, glue, and cuticle oil are off the table for hygiene reasons. Anything unopened within that 30-day window is fair game.

question: What's not returnable at all?
answer: Six things are non-returnable no matter what: opened nail glue and adhesives, used or opened nail kits, used or opened boxes of tips, sale or discounted items (unless they arrive defective), gift cards, and opened cuticle oil. Hygiene and safety drive this — we can't resell anything that's been opened.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Once we receive and inspect your return, we'll email you to let you know. If it's approved, the refund lands on your original payment method within 5–7 business days. Heads up — the original shipping charge isn't refundable.

question: What if my order arrives damaged?
answer: Email us at support@bellezzamiami.com within 7 days of delivery, attach a photo of the damage and your order number, and we'll send a replacement at no cost to you. No back-and-forth, no return shipping required.

question: I got the wrong item or something's missing from my order — what do I do?
answer: Email support@bellezzamiami.com within 7 days of delivery with your order number and what came wrong or what's missing. We'll get the right thing out to you fast.
